title: aniba ferrea
intro: Aniba ferrea, also known as Brazilian rosewood or rosewood, is a species of tree in the family Lauraceae. This plant is valued for its aromatic wood and resin, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aniba ferrea include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Aniba ferrea may include essential oils extracted from its wood, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
